evidence: Lifting.lean:299-309 (IsCoveringMap ns), lifts a homotopy I x A -> X through a covering map given a lift of the t=0 slice -- textbook homotopy lifting property; currently tagged only homotopy-group/homotopy QIDs, missing this exact-match concept.

evidence: Lifting.lean:331, relative-homotopy variant of liftHomotopy for covering maps (PreconnectedSpace A); currently unmapped. Same homotopy lifting property concept, restricted to homotopies fixed on a subspace.
verify_note: def Lifting.lean:331, relative HLP variant for covering maps; special_case honest; Q3983973 verified.

evidence: Lifting.lean:127-136, continuity of a lift g of a homotopy f:I x A -> X through a separated local homeomorphism p:E->X; the general (non-covering-map) form of the homotopy lifting property. Currently unmapped.
verify_note: Only proves CONTINUITY of a given lift, no lift existence - not a statement of the HLP; generalization overclaims.

evidence: HSpaces.lean:121, every topological monoid (MulOneClass + ContinuousMul) yields an HSpace structure via its own operation -- the canonical family of examples cited directly in the H-space Wikipedia article.
